stemHtml: If a flight crew believes they are flying through an area with a high concentration of ice crystals, what is the most effective way to use airborne weather radar to avoid the hazardous conditions?

options.a: Change the radar return to above the aircraft to identify the ice crystal precipitation and fly downwind of it.
options.b: Analyse the radar returns at the aircraft level to identify the ice crystal intensity ahead and fly around it.
options.c: Identify the ice crystal zone by looking for the greatest ice crystal radar return and fly beneath it.
options.d: Using the radar tilt, identify the main convection core and fly upwind of it.
